revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
;Note :The flag variant marked "1863" for the image [[:File:Royal Flag of Vietnam (1802–1885).svg]] has been labeled '''fictitious and unofficial'''. :If a misleading usage of that 1863 flag variant is discovered in a ''Wikipedia'' article, then it should be removed from that article.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Country data templates of countries|Vietnam]] [[Category:Country data templates of Vietnam| ]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
;Note :The flag variant marked "1863" for the image [[:File:Royal Flag of Vietnam (1802–1885).svg]] has been labeled '''fictitious and unofficial'''. :If a misleading usage of that 1863 flag variant is discovered in a ''Wikipedia'' article, then it should be removed from that article.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Country data templates of countries|Vietnam]] [[Category:Country data templates of Vietnam| ]]
}}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
;Note :The flag variant marked "1863" for the image [[:File:Royal Flag of Vietnam (1802–1885).svg]] has been labeled '''fictitious and unofficial'''. :If a misleading usage of that 1863 flag variant is discovered in a ''Wikipedia'' article, then it should be removed from that article.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Country data templates of countries|Vietnam]] [[Category:Country data templates of Vietnam| ]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
;Note :The flag variant marked "1863" for the image [[:File:Royal Flag of Vietnam (1802–1885).svg]] has been labeled '''fictitious and unofficial'''. :If a misleading usage of that 1863 flag variant is discovered in a ''Wikipedia'' article, then it should be removed from that article.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Country data templates of countries|Vietnam]] [[Category:Country data templates of Vietnam| ]]
}}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
;Note :The flag variant marked "1863" for the image [[:File:Royal Flag of Vietnam (1802–1885).svg]] has been labeled '''fictitious and unofficial'''. :If a misleading usage of that 1863 flag variant is discovered in a ''Wikipedia'' article, then it should be removed from that article.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Country data templates of countries|Vietnam]] [[Category:Country data templates of Vietnam| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Vietnam%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Vietnam%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
;Note :The flag variant marked "1863" for the image [[:File:Royal Flag of Vietnam (1802–1885).svg]] has been labeled '''fictitious and unofficial'''. :If a misleading usage of that 1863 flag variant is discovered in a ''Wikipedia'' article, then it should be removed from that article.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Country data templates of countries|Vietnam]] [[Category:Country data templates of Vietnam| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Vietnam%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}}
;Note :The flag variant marked "1863" for the image [[:File:Royal Flag of Vietnam (1802–1885).svg]] has been labeled '''fictitious and unofficial'''. :If a misleading usage of that 1863 flag variant is discovered in a ''Wikipedia'' article, then it should be removed from that article.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Country data templates of countries|Vietnam]] [[Category:Country data templates of Vietnam| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
